mobileAppSection1.description: Take full control of your inventory management from anywhere with our powerful mobile app. Scan barcodes, track shipments, and get real-time alerts right from your phone.

mobileAppSection2.description: Take full control of your inventory management with our powerful mobile app. Scan barcodes, track shipments, and get real-time alerts right from your phone.

items.name: John Smith
items.quote: This app has revolutionized how we manage inventory. The barcode scanning feature alone saves us hours each week.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.quote: Being able to check stock levels and receive alerts on my phone has made my job so much easier.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.quote: The offline mode is a lifesaver. I can work in areas with poor connectivity and everything syncs automatically.

mobileAppSection3.description: Experience the full power of Sazzad on your mobile device. Manage inventory, track shipments, and stay connected wherever you go.
mobileAppSection3.compatibility: Compatible with iOS 14+ and Android 11+. Requires internet for initial sync.
